tasks.subject: [channels-and-agent-adapters] [P1] Rename Session Sidebar 'Adapters' section to 'Channels'
tasks.description:
Update all user-facing strings in the Session Sidebar ConnectionsView component from adapter-centric vocabulary to channel-centric vocabulary. **File:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/ConnectionsView.tsx` **Changes:** 1. Line ~185 — Change the `` text from `Adapters` to `Channels`: ```tsx // Before: Adapters // After: Channels ``` 2. Line ~206 — Change the disabled-by-agent message: ```tsx // Before:

Relay disabled for this agent

// After:

Channels disabled for this agent

``` 3. Line ~219 — Change the empty state message: ```tsx // Before:

No adapters configured

// After:

No channels configured

``` 4. Update the component's TSDoc comment (line ~91): ```tsx // Before: /** Read-only adapter and agent summary for the sidebar Connections tab. */ // After: /** Read-only channel and agent summary for the sidebar Connections tab. */ ``` 5. Update the aria-label on the SidebarGroupAction (line ~188): ```tsx // Before: setRelayOpen(true)}> // After: setRelayOpen(true)}> ``` **No structural changes.** Keep the read-only behavior, deep-link arrows, and all other sections (Agents, Tools) unchanged. Internal variable names (`visibleAdapters`, `ADAPTER_STATE_COLORS`) stay as-is per the non-goal of no internal code refactoring. **Acceptance criteria:** - The sidebar section heading reads "Channels" instead of "Adapters" - Disabled agent message reads "Channels disabled for this agent" - Empty state reads "No channels configured" - Aria label updated to "Open Channels panel" - No other behavioral changes to the component
tasks.activeForm: Renaming Session Sidebar adapter labels to channel vocabulary

tasks.subject: [channels-and-agent-adapters] [P1] Rename Relay Panel feature-disabled message and section headers
tasks.description:
Update the Relay Panel's feature-disabled message and the ConnectionsTab section headers from adapter vocabulary to channel vocabulary. **File 1:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/relay/ui/RelayPanel.tsx` Change the `FeatureDisabledState` description prop (line ~46): ```tsx // Before: // After: ``` **File 2:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/relay/ui/ConnectionsTab.tsx` Change the section headers: 1. Line ~161 — "Configured Adapters" heading: ```tsx // Before:

Configured Adapters

// After:

Active Channels

``` 2. Line ~204 — "Available Adapters" heading: ```tsx // Before:

Available Adapters

// After:

Available Channels

``` 3. Line ~177 — Empty configured state text: ```tsx // Before:

No adapters configured

Add an adapter below to connect agents to external services

// After:

No channels configured

Add a channel below to connect agents to external services

``` 4. Update the ConnectionsTab TSDoc comment (line ~37): ```tsx // Before: /** Renders configured adapter instances and available adapter types from the catalog. */ // After: /** Renders active channels and available channel types from the catalog. */ ``` **Acceptance criteria:** - Feature disabled state says "Channels require Relay" not "Relay provides inter-agent messaging" - Section headers read "Active Channels" and "Available Channels" - Empty state text updated to channel vocabulary - No structural changes to the component behavior
tasks.activeForm: Renaming Relay Panel and ConnectionsTab section headers to channel vocabulary

tasks.subject: [channels-and-agent-adapters] [P1] Rename command palette entry from 'Relay Messaging' to 'Channels'
tasks.description:
Update the command palette feature contribution label from "Relay Messaging" to "Channels".

**File:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/model/palette-contributions.ts`

Change the relay entry label (line ~15):
```tsx
// Before:
{
  id: 'relay',
  label: 'Relay Messaging',
  icon: 'Radio',
  action: 'openRelay',
  category: 'feature',
  priority: 2,
},

// After:
{
  id: 'relay',
  label: 'Channels',
  icon: 'Radio',
  action: 'openRelay',
  category: 'feature',
  priority: 2,
},
```

Note: The `id` ('relay') and `action` ('openRelay') stay unchanged — these are internal identifiers. Only the user-facing `label` changes.

**Test file updates required:**

The following test files reference "Relay Messaging" in assertions and need updating to "Channels":

1. `apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/model/__tests__/use-palette-items.test.ts` — line ~51: update `label: 'Relay Messaging'` to `label: 'Channels'`

2. `apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/__tests__/command-palette-integration.test.tsx` — line ~102: update mock data `label: 'Relay Messaging'` to `label: 'Channels'`; line ~346-348: update test description and `screen.getByText('Relay Messaging')` to `screen.getByText('Channels')`

3. `apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/__tests__/CommandPaletteDialog.test.tsx` — line ~141: update mock data; line ~164: update name; line ~240: update `getByText('Relay Messaging')` to `getByText('Channels')`; line ~346-348: update test description and text query

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Command palette shows "Channels" when searching
- All existing command palette tests pass with updated label text
- The icon remains `Radio` and the action remains `openRelay`
tasks.activeForm: Renaming command palette entry from Relay Messaging to Channels

tasks.subject: [channels-and-agent-adapters] [P1] Rename Agent Dialog Connections tab label to 'Channels' with Radio icon

This is the label-only change for Phase 1; the full tab content rewrite happens in Phase 2. **File:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/ui/AgentDialog.tsx` 1. Update the import (line ~2): ```tsx // Before: import { FolderOpen, User, Sparkles, Zap, Plug2 } from 'lucide-react'; // After: import { FolderOpen, User, Sparkles, Zap, Radio } from 'lucide-react'; ``` 2. Update the sidebar navigation item (line ~120): ```tsx // Before: Connections // After: Channels ``` 3. Update the panel value (line ~156): ```tsx // Before:
Connections
// After:
Channels
``` 4. Update the component TSDoc (line ~35): ```tsx // Before: * Four sections: Identity, Personality, Capabilities, and Connections. // After: * Four sections: Identity, Personality, Capabilities, and Channels. ``` Note: The `ConnectionsTab` component import stays unchanged in Phase 1. It will be replaced by `ChannelsTab` in Phase 2 task 2.1. **Acceptance criteria:** - Agent Dialog sidebar shows "Channels" with Radio icon instead of "Connections" with Plug2 - Panel header reads "Channels" - Tab navigation works correctly with the new value - Existing ConnectionsTab component renders correctly within the renamed tab

tasks.subject: [channels-and-agent-adapters] [P1] Update existing tests for vocabulary changes
tasks.description:
After all Phase 1 vocabulary changes are applied, audit and update existing test files that assert on the old vocabulary strings.

**Files to audit and update:**

1. `apps/client/src/layers/features/relay/ui/__tests__/ActivityFeed.test.tsx`:
   - Line ~111: Update test description `'never shows "Set up an adapter" button'` to `'never shows "Set up a channel" button'`
   - Line ~114: Update assertion `screen.queryByText('Set up an adapter')` to `screen.queryByText('Set up a channel')` (if this text actually appears in the component render)

2. Command palette tests (already detailed in task 1.4 — verify they pass)

3. Run a grep across all test files for remaining instances of old vocabulary:
   - Search for: `Relay Messaging`, `Configured Adapters`, `Available Adapters`, `No adapters configured`, `Relay disabled for this agent`, `Add Adapter`, `Set up an adapter`
   - Update any found instances to the new vocabulary

**Verification steps:**

1. Run `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/relay/` — all relay feature tests pass
2. Run `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/` — all command palette tests pass
3. Run `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/` — all session list tests pass
4. Run `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/` — all agent settings tests pass
5. Run `pnpm typecheck` — no type errors

**Acceptance criteria:**
- All existing tests pass with the new vocabulary
- No test files reference old vocabulary strings that should have been updated
- `pnpm test -- --run` passes across the full test suite
tasks.activeForm: Updating existing tests for vocabulary rename changes

tasks.subject: [channels-and-agent-adapters] [P3] Expand AgentsTab with Agent Adapters section
tasks.description:
Add an Agent Adapters configuration section to the existing Settings AgentsTab, between the default agent selector and the DorkBot personality reset. **File:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/ui/AgentsTab.tsx` **Changes:** 1. Add imports: ```tsx import { Bot, Cpu, CircuitBoard } from 'lucide-react'; import { SettingRow, Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/layers/shared/ui'; import { AdapterRuntimeCard } from './AdapterRuntimeCard'; ``` 2. Define the hardcoded runtime adapters constant (above the component): ```typescript const RUNTIME_ADAPTERS = [ { id: 'claude-code', name: 'Claude Code', icon: Bot, description: 'Anthropic Claude via the Agent SDK. Powers all current DorkOS agents.', status: 'active' as const, }, { id: 'openai', name: 'OpenAI', icon: Cpu, description: 'GPT models via the OpenAI API.', status: 'coming-soon' as const, }, { id: 'local-model', name: 'Local Model', icon: CircuitBoard, description: 'Run local models via Ollama or llama.cpp.', status: 'coming-soon' as const, }, ] as const; ``` 3. Add the Agent Adapters section between the default agent FieldCard and the DorkBot personality FieldCard. The full updated component body: ```tsx return ( <> {/* Existing: Default agent selector */} {agents.length > 0 && ( )} {/* NEW: Agent Adapters section */}

Agent Adapters

AI runtime backends that power your agents. Configure model selection, permissions, and resource limits.

{RUNTIME_ADAPTERS.map((adapter) => ( {adapter.id === 'claude-code' && ( <> )} ))}
{/* Existing: DorkBot personality reset */} {/* ... existing content unchanged ... */} {dorkbot && ( )} ); ``` Note: The config rows for Claude Code are currently read-only (`disabled`). Making them editable requires a server-side config mutation endpoint which is out of scope. The UI surface is established now for future activation. **Acceptance criteria:** - Agent Adapters section appears between default agent selector and DorkBot personality reset - Claude Code card shows as active with expandable config rows - OpenAI and Local Model cards show as "Coming Soon" with dashed borders - Existing default agent selector and DorkBot reset remain unchanged - Config rows are currently disabled (read-only display) - All existing AgentsTab tests still pass
tasks.activeForm: Expanding AgentsTab with Agent Adapters section

tasks.subject: [channels-and-agent-adapters] [P3] Write tests for Settings ChannelsTab, ChannelSettingRow, and AdapterRuntimeCard
tasks.description:
Write unit tests for the three Phase 3 Settings components.

**Test file 1:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/ui/__tests__/ChannelSettingRow.test.tsx`

```typescript
/**
 * @vitest-environment jsdom
 */
import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest';
import { render, screen } from '@testing-library/react';
import userEvent from '@testing-library/user-event';
import '@testing-library/jest-dom';
import { ChannelSettingRow } from '../ChannelSettingRow';
```

Test cases:
- `renders channel name and label`
- `shows agent count in metadata`
- `shows green dot for connected state`
- `shows amber dot for disconnected state`
- `shows red dot for error state`
- `toggle calls onToggle with new value`
- `configure button calls onConfigure`

**Test file 2:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/ui/__tests__/AdapterRuntimeCard.test.tsx`

```typescript
/**
 * @vitest-environment jsdom
 */
import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest';
import { render, screen } from '@testing-library/react';
import userEvent from '@testing-library/user-event';
import '@testing-library/jest-dom';
import { Bot } from 'lucide-react';
import { AdapterRuntimeCard } from '../AdapterRuntimeCard';
```

Test cases:
- `renders adapter name, description, and icon`
- `shows Active badge for active status`
- `shows Coming Soon badge for coming-soon status`
- `coming-soon cards have dashed border and no expand`
- `clicking header toggles expanded body`
- `expanded body renders children`
- `toggle calls onToggle without triggering expand`
- `animation uses 200ms duration`

**Test file 3:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/ui/__tests__/ChannelsTab.test.tsx`

Mock entity hooks:
```typescript
vi.mock('@/layers/entities/relay', () => ({
  useAdapterCatalog: vi.fn(() => ({ data: [] })),
  useRelayEnabled: vi.fn(() => true),
  useToggleAdapter: vi.fn(() => ({ mutate: vi.fn() })),
  useRemoveAdapter: vi.fn(() => ({ mutate: vi.fn() })),
}));
vi.mock('@/layers/entities/binding', () => ({
  useBindings: vi.fn(() => ({ data: [] })),
}));
```

Test cases:
- `renders active channels from catalog data`
- `toggle calls useToggleAdapter with correct ID`
- `configure opens wizard in edit mode`
- `catalog grid shows available channel types`
- `shows Relay disabled state when relay is not enabled`
- `shows empty state when no channels configured`
- `shows agent count per channel from binding data`

**Test file 4:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/ui/__tests__/AgentsTab.test.tsx` (update existing)

Add new test cases to the existing AgentsTab test file:
- `renders Agent Adapters section`
- `shows Claude Code card as active`
- `shows OpenAI and Local Model as coming soon`
- `Claude Code card expands to show config rows`
- `preserves existing default agent selector`
- `preserves DorkBot personality reset`

**Acceptance criteria:**
- All tests pass with `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/`
- Tests cover happy path, empty states, and disabled states
- Tests verify toggle/configure interactions
- Existing AgentsTab tests still pass
tasks.activeForm: Writing tests for Phase 3 Settings tab components

tasks.subject: [channels-and-agent-adapters] [P4] Write tests for AgentRow channel badges and navigation
tasks.description:
Write tests for the Phase 4 changes: channel badges on AgentRow and bidirectional navigation.

**Test file 1:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/agents-list/ui/__tests__/AgentRow.test.tsx` (update existing or create)

Mock entity hooks:
```typescript
vi.mock('@/layers/entities/binding', () => ({
  useBindings: vi.fn(() => ({ data: [] })),
}));
vi.mock('@/layers/entities/relay', () => ({
  useAdapterCatalog: vi.fn(() => ({ data: [] })),
  useRelayEnabled: vi.fn(() => true),
}));
```

New test cases:
- `renders channel badges for agent with bindings` — mock bindings for the agent's ID, mock catalog with matching adapter instances. Assert Badge elements with channel names appear.
- `shows "no channels" text for agent with no bindings when relay enabled` — mock empty bindings, relay enabled. Assert "no channels" text present.
- `hides channel indicators when relay is disabled` — mock relay disabled. Assert no channel badges and no "no channels" text.
- `handles agent with multiple channel bindings` — mock 3 bindings. Assert 3 badge elements.
- `Channels button opens AgentDialog at channels tab` — mock the AgentDialog, simulate click on "Channels" button, verify settingsOpen is set with initialTab="channels".

**Test file 2:** `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/ui/__tests__/AgentDialog.test.tsx` (update existing or create)

New test cases:
- `respects initialTab prop to start on Channels tab` — render AgentDialog with `initialTab="channels"`. Assert the Channels panel is active.
- `defaults to identity tab when no initialTab provided` — render without initialTab. Assert identity panel is active.
- `syncs activeTab when initialTab changes` — render with identity, then re-render with channels. Assert Channels panel becomes active.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- All tests pass with `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/agents-list/`
- All tests pass with `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/`
- Channel badge rendering is covered for 0, 1, and multiple bindings
- Navigation behavior (initialTab) is tested
- Relay disabled state is tested
tasks.activeForm: Writing tests for AgentRow channel badges and navigation

tasks.subject: [channels-and-agent-adapters] [P4] Full integration verification and typecheck
tasks.description:
Final verification pass to ensure all phases work together, types are correct, and no regressions exist.

**Steps:**

1. Run full typecheck:
```bash
pnpm typecheck
```
Fix any TypeScript errors introduced by the new components, especially:
- New imports that may need barrel re-exports
- AdapterBinding type compatibility with ChannelBindingCard props
- App-store type composition with new PanelsSlice fields

2. Run full test suite:
```bash
pnpm test -- --run
```
All tests should pass, including:
- Phase 1 vocabulary tests
- Phase 2 ChannelsTab/ChannelPicker/ChannelBindingCard tests
- Phase 3 Settings ChannelsTab/ChannelSettingRow/AdapterRuntimeCard tests
- Phase 4 AgentRow badges and navigation tests
- All pre-existing tests

3. Run lint:
```bash
pnpm lint
```
Fix any lint errors, particularly:
- Missing TSDoc on new exported functions
- FSD layer import violations
- Unused imports from old ConnectionsTab

4. Update barrel exports where needed:

`apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/index.ts` — may need to export ChannelsTab if used externally.

`apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/index.ts` — may need to export ChannelsTab for settings.

5. Verify the old `ConnectionsTab.tsx` in `features/agent-settings/ui/` has been removed (task 2.4).

6. Vocabulary audit — grep all user-facing strings in the modified feature directories for any remaining instances of:
- "Relay Adapter" (should be "Channel")
- "Configured Adapters" (should be "Active Channels")
- "Available Adapters" (should be "Available Channels")
- "Add Adapter" (should be "Set Up a Channel")
- "No adapters configured" (should be "No channels configured")

**Acceptance criteria:**
- `pnpm typecheck` passes with zero errors
- `pnpm test -- --run` passes with zero failures
- `pnpm lint` passes with zero errors
- No stale vocabulary remains in user-facing strings
- Old ConnectionsTab.tsx is removed from agent-settings
- All barrel exports are correct
tasks.activeForm: Running final integration verification and typecheck
